title: Rename sync step label to reflect all agents
description: As a developer, I want the pre-commit pipeline step name to accurately reflect that it syncs all three agents (Copilot, Claude Code, Codex), not just Copilot.
acceptanceCriteria: Step label changed from 'SYNC COPILOT INSTRUCTIONS' to 'SYNC ALL AGENT INSTRUCTIONS'
pnpm run sync:instructions still works correctly
notes: Simple rename task. User chose option A (simple rename) over splitting into separate steps.
